name: Enterprise Manufacturing (DACH)
description: Large manufacturing and industrial enterprises with 1,000+ employees in DACH modernizing IT landscapes with hybrid cloud, OT/IT convergence, and multi-cloud governance.

tam.description: European manufacturing enterprise cloud and IT modernization
tam.source: LLM estimate based on IDC, Gartner 2025 manufacturing IT spending in Europe

sam.description: DACH manufacturing enterprise managed cloud and hybrid infrastructure
sam.source: LLM estimate: Germany is Europe's largest manufacturing economy; ~EUR 3.2B addressable in managed cloud for industrial enterprises

som.description: 50 manufacturing accounts x EUR 4M average ACV over 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up estimate: targeting top 50 DACH manufacturing enterprises with hybrid cloud and migration deals
